items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding a time-limited accept/decline window. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or traces that confirm the expected behavior of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not directly address the requirements of the persona scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
